text:
"Betrayal" is a song from the film Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo. It is track 13 in the album Music from Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo, disc 1. https://vgmdb.net/album/35707 

In the film, the track is featured when Evangelion 13, under the control of Shinji Ikari, ascends the remains of Second Angel Lilith and subsequently removes the twin spears of Longinus embedded into it.

Lyrics

 
With vengeance retribution will be sought with time,
The sacrifice the crime.

Apostles feed upon the flesh and in return
The poor soul reaches out.

Wrest crippled, mental torture,
The chance to be immortal.

Once friends betrayed so ruthless,
Now dead his friend and friendship.
Once friends betrayed so heartless,
Memories crushed to ashes.
